input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.13.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.13.2.1
            TITLE: inspection sticker(s) are issued following the completion of all or part of technical inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.13.2.1: Inspection Sticker(s) are issued following the completion of all or part of Technical Inspection
IN.13.2.1 Inspection Sticker(s) are issued following the completion of all or part of Technical Inspection

final_answer: Inspection Sticker(s) are issued following the completion of all or part of Technical Inspection
